channel.title: java on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in java on Frank Huang

item.title: The reason why I don't like using Java
item.description: In a recent porject, I have been using Java as the programming language for the backend compute engine. I have to admit that Java is fast. But the reason why I’m not that into it is because of the duplication of code is just everywhere. Scenario public abstract class AbstractFather{} public class ChildA extends AbstractFather{} public class ChildB extends AbstractFather{} public class DAO{ }
